accountType.title: Banking Account Type
accountType.description: The type of banking account (e.g. Checking).

claimDate.title: Insurance Claim Date
claimDate.description: The date the insurance claim was filed.

existingReasonSummary.title: Existing Reason Summary
existingReasonSummary.description: The system-generated reason this case was originally flagged.

found.title: Found
found.description: Whether a matching risk case was found.

householdName.title: Household Name
householdName.description: The name of the customer's household record.

insuranceFraudFlag.title: Insurance Fraud Flag
insuranceFraudFlag.description: Whether the linked insurance claim was itself flagged as fraudulent.

policyType.title: Insurance Policy Type
policyType.description: The type of insurance policy (e.g. Auto).

riskScore.title: Composite Risk Score
riskScore.description: The customer's composite risk score (0-5) from the Calculated Insight.

status.title: Current Status
status.description: The Risk Case's current status (e.g. New, Under Investigation).

vehicleCategory.title: Insurance Vehicle Category
vehicleCategory.description: The vehicle category on the insurance policy (e.g. Sedan).
